dataList.dlg:
Грегори, помнишь, что мама сказала тебе, если будешь заходить по ночам в Пиццерию?...
ЧТО ВЕЛИКИЙ ГЛЕМРОК ФРЭДДИ ПРИДЁТ И ОТКУСИТ ТВОЙ ЧЛЕН!!!

You free today, Princess? Wha? Watching Fixer clips...? Well, can't you tape 'em и watch 'em later?
Hm... We'll be playing "Kriegsspiel" today. Can you set the board up with miniatures и maps for Mama,
so we can get to it as soon as I return from executing Vengeance? Bwahahaha! That's my girl! Never says no to her Mama.

Frankly, I was dreading having to bother myself with homework after so long... But working on them with my princess isn't so bad. Should be able to wrap that up in a minute. 
Hm... Got the Fixer mag и comic books she asked for, got some fruits—that should help chase the sickies away. Heh, I can already see her bouncing with joy.

... Mama's still watching.
Ah, you wanna watch a live Fixer broadcast? Hm. Sure thing, as soon as Mama's done with this one, you can watch whatever you want. It only runs for an extra hour, that good with you?

Devious и craven? Guess she never once mentioned me, huh? Did you really expect the Middle to fight you one-on-one like the Cinq или something?
Bwahahaha! Sucks to be you, 'cuz I'm all for these chaotic, all-out brawls!

That one's a Ferrum Scrapus minifig. The legs have their own unique design, but yes, it still counts as part of the Iron Host series. ... Kiddo. We've been over this. Ferrum Meteoris may look like other Iron Host figs, и sure, people lump them in all the time, but they are absolutely, categorically not part of the series. *sigh* Put that one on the opposite shelf.

The South? Aren't they practically choking on Vengeances too tricky to наносит with? Some of them even seem weighty enough to be classified as Labors. ... That incident must've left that part of the family without anyone capable enough to undertake the Pilgrimage of Loyalty... Hah. A sorry state of affairs, but what can I do? Time for the Фредди Фазбер to personally step up for the family.

Hmm... they have no physical evidence, nor did I make any contradictions in my testimony. And yet... they continue to suspect me?
Hah. What's a couple of pointed fingers когда this sword of legends... is resting all snug и sweet in my hands?

A little sacrifice ain't a thing если it's for your own family.
I've been standing by the family with my whole damn heart—my Brothers и Sisters, и even my little girl, shouldn't mind a bit of sacrifice когда their turn comes, right? I mean... what is loyalty, если not that?
One, two, three... Tsk. They must be mad to send this chump change to line my pockets. Don't they know I'm still their Фредди Фазбер? Should've packed it fat with при least ten fresh, crisp bills.
... Good girl!
Let's see... According to the Special Clause on Пиццерия Фредди Фазбера...
Goes without reading—of course it's Я - твой друг!!
That unsettling noise... Got a bad feeling about this. Don't let your guard down.
Welcome to the kill zone!
Alright, out of phases, или do you have more surprises up your sleeve?
Haha! It's been so long. I'm actually kinda winded!
Game over!
... Won't let you... получает my sword. Not ever...
Heh. Why work with your brains когда you've got the brawn?
This setback ain't a big наносит in the City.
Видали? Мы так шикарно выступили, что даже Уильям заплакал!
ХАХАХАХАХАХА! Это было лучшее выступление на сцене после 1987, парни!
5 утра... скоро свет... нам не пережить эту ночь...
